title: optimization - priority
description: Modpack, where the priority is on optimization
body:
# ModPack optimization - priority
**optimization is a priority - This is a mod pack built on cloth.
The main mods are sodium+sodium extra. It helps to optimize minecraft, which makes the game more enjoyable even on weak computers, as well as reduces the load on the PC.**.

## Who is this modpack for?

**Modpak created for those who want to play in minecraft as well as with optimization mods, as well as for those who often add to their builds other mods, or builds.
Due to the fact that this modpack has only mods for optimization, it is combined with your mods.**

## Why sodium and not optifine?

## A comparison between optifine, and sodium.

If you take 2 different versions, on one optifine and on the other sodium, the tests show that sodium optimizes the game better than optifine

## Compatibility with mods
 
Some optimization mods just can't work with optifine, so the whole mod-pack won't work with it

## Аunctionality
   
No matter what anyone says, but optifine is irrelevant on newer versions, as there are mods that completely replace its functionality

## Why this modpack and not others?

## Optifine functions
All optifine functionality is already in this mod pack! Dynamic lighting, adaptive glass, optifine capes, shader installation, etc.

## Combination with other mods

This mod pack only has mods for optimization, and optifine functionality, so all your mods or mod packs will easily become on this mod pack.

## Time saved!

you will waste a lot of your time if you download all the mods separately, so better download this mod pack in a couple of seconds, and do not waste your time!
